title: salix × poelliana
intro: Salix × poelliana, also known as the hybrid willow or Poellmann's willow, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Salix × poelliana include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Salix × poelliana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal properties.
